tr.td: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Human isophane insulin 70 unit/mL and recombinant human regular insulin 30 unit/mL solution for injection
Inject 10 units (70/30 insulin) subcutaneously twice daily before breakfast and dinner
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Clopidogrel (as clopidogrel bisulfate) 75 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
400 micrograms per spray, use one spray under the tongue as needed for chest pain, repeat every 5 minutes if needed, up to 3 sprays in 15 minutes
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
Transfusion of packed red blood cells
Development of individualized plan of care

ul.li: Maintain or reduce HbA1c to below 6.5% through diabetes self-management.
Achieve and maintain a healthy body weight as part of diabetes self-management.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modification.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
Reduce body weight by 5% to improve blood pressure and metabolic health.
Limit sodium intake to less than 2.3 grams per day to support blood pressure control.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity aerobic physical activity per week.

tr.td: Vaccine product containing only Influenza virus antigen (medicinal product)
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported

Achieve and maintain a healthy body weight as part of diabetes self-management.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modification.

Limit sodium intake to less than 2.3 grams per day to support blood pressure control.
